findings.title: CORS origin broadened from restricted allowlist to wildcard
findings.evidence: CORS origin changed from ["https://admin.example.com"] to "*", allowing credential leakage from any origin. This removes restrictive origin-based access control and violates CORS security best practices.

notes: Raw diff confirms the report's findings exactly. Single file change with minimal scope makes risk assessment straightforward.
No compensating security controls or legitimate use case justification evident in the changed code.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
